ScriptNode.Name: ADCU1301_DTC_Clear
ScriptNode.Expression: return GetStringValue('@/broadcast/DN_ADCU1301') !== '' && (GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '08' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '09' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '12' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '19' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '27' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '30' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '31' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '32' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '33' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '48');

Args.Arg: ZCUD1D01 Read Vehicle Battery State Of Charge
ZCUD1D01 L11 PinCode ReCheck and Upload
ZCUD1D01 Write Inf on Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 Secret Key EPB1 Write Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 Secret Key EPB2 Write Check and Upload

ScriptNode.Name: ZCUD1D01_dTPMS_Check_and_Upload
ScriptNode.Expression: return ( GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_JD') === '04' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_JD') === '02' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_JD') === '05' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_JD') === '06' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_JD') === '07');

Args.Arg: ZCUD1D01 dTPMS configuration Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 ECM IMMO Secret Key Write Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 IEM IMMO Secret Key Write Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 PCM IMMO Secret Key Write Check and Upload
ZCUD1D01 TCAM IMMO Secret Key Write Check and Upload
TCAM1101 L11 PinCode ReCheck and Upload

ScriptNode.Name: TCAM1101_DK_BNCM_KEY_Check_And_Upload

Args.Arg: TCAM1101 Secret Key for Immobilizer Check
TCAM1101 Telematics SIM-Card ICC Number Record
TCAM Mobile Modem IMEI Number Record
TCAM1101 Installation Status Check of The P12 Certificate
TCAM1101 Certificate Serial Number Check and Record
DHU1001 L11 PinCode ReCheck and Upload
DHU1001 Write Inf on Check and Upload type1
DHU1002 L11 PinCode ReCheck and Upload
DHU1002 Write Information Check And Upload
DHU1002 Certificate Serial Number Check and Record
DHU1002 Installation Status Check of The P12 Certificate
ADCU1301 Write Information Check and Upload

ScriptNode.Name: ADCU1301_Write_Information_Check_And_Record_ADC052
ScriptNode.Expression: return GetStringValue('@/broadcast/DN_ADCU1301') !== '' && (GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '08' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '09' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '12' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '19' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '27' ||GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_VN') === '32');

Args.Arg: ADCU1301 Write Infomation Check and Upload(ADC052)
ADCU1301 Zeekr Write Information Check and Upload Type2(ADC052)
ADCU1304 Installation Status Check of The P12 Certificate
ADCU1304 Certificate Serial Number Check and Record
ADCU1304 Write Information Check and Upload
BCM1D81 Write Information Check and Upload type1
BECM Hybrid Battery State Of Charge Record
BECM Raw Value Of isolation resistance
ECM Write Information Check and Upload1
ECM Write Information Check and Upload3
IEM Write Information Check and Upload1
IEM Write Information Check and Upload2

ScriptNode.Name: IEM_Write_Information_Check_and_Upload3
ScriptNode.Expression: return GetStringValue('@/broadcast/DN_IEM') !== '' && (GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_CC') === '06' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '02' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '04' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '06' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '07' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '12');

Args.Arg: IEM Write Information Check and Upload3

ScriptNode.Name: IEM_Motor_Temperature_Ri
ScriptNode.Expression: return GetStringValue('@/broadcast/DN_IEM') !== '' && (GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_CC') === '06' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '02' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '04' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '05' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '06' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '07' || GetStringValue('@/broadcast/PML_W3') === '12');

Args.Arg: PSCM1632 Write Information Check and Upload type1
RBCM1613 Write Information Check and Upload type1
